description: Comprehensive structural comparison figure: pLDDT profiles, active site conservation, C-terminal extension analysis, and summary table
code:
# Create comprehensive structural and pLDDT comparison figure
import requests
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.gridspec as gridspec

def fetch_alphafold_pdb(url):
    resp = requests.get(url)
    ca_coords = []
    plddt_values = []
    residue_ids = []
    for line in resp.text.split('\n'):
        if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
            x = float(line[30:38])
            y = float(line[38:46])
            z = float(line[46:54])
            bfactor = float(line[60:66])
            resid = int(line[22:26])
            ca_coords.append([x, y, z])
            plddt_values.append(bfactor)
            residue_ids.append(resid)
    return np.array(ca_coords), np.array(plddt_values), residue_ids

acad9_coords, acad9_plddt, acad9_resids = fetch_alphafold_pdb(
    "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-Q9H845-F1-model_v6.pdb")
vlcad_coords, vlcad_plddt, vlcad_resids = fetch_alphafold_pdb(
    "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-P49748-F1-model_v6.pdb")

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(16, 14))
gs = gridspec.GridSpec(3, 2, hspace=0.4, wspace=0.35)

# Panel A: pLDDT profiles
ax1 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, :])
ax1.plot(acad9_resids, acad9_plddt, color='#2196F3', linewidth=1, alpha=0.8, label='ACAD9 (Q9H845)')
ax1.plot(vlcad_resids, vlcad_plddt, color='#F44336', linewidth=1, alpha=0.8, label='VLCAD (P49748)')

# Mark active sites
ax1.axvline(x=426, color='#2196F3', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, linewidth=1)
ax1.axvline(x=462, color='#F44336', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, linewidth=1)
ax1.annotate('ACAD9\nE426', xy=(426, 95), fontsize=8, color='#2196F3', ha='center')
ax1.annotate('VLCAD\nE462', xy=(462, 88), fontsize=8, color='#F44336', ha='center')

# Mark VLCAD C-terminal extension
ax1.axvspan(621, 655, alpha=0.2, color='#FF9800', label='VLCAD C-terminal extension (622-655)')

# Mark signal peptide region
ax1.axvspan(1, 37, alpha=0.1, color='gray', label='ACAD9 mitochondrial signal (1-37)')

ax1.set_xlabel('Residue Number', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_ylabel('pLDDT (AlphaFold Confidence)', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_title('A. AlphaFold pLDDT Confidence Profiles', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
ax1.legend(fontsize=9, loc='lower left')
ax1.set_ylim(40, 105)
ax1.set_xlim(0, 660)

# Panel B: Active site region detail comparison
ax2 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])

# Fetch sequences for active site comparison
def fetch_seq(accession):
    url = f"https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/{accession}.fasta"
    resp = requests.get(url)
    lines = resp.text.strip().split('\n')
    return ''.join(lines[1:])

acad9_seq = fetch_seq("Q9H845")
vlcad_seq = fetch_seq("P49748")

# Active site region comparison (20 residues centered on catalytic Glu)
acad9_as_region = acad9_seq[406:446]  # around E426
vlcad_as_region = vlcad_seq[442:482]  # around E462

# Show conservation as bar chart
conservation = []
for i in range(min(len(acad9_as_region), len(vlcad_as_region))):
    if acad9_as_region[i] == vlcad_as_region[i]:
        conservation.append(2)  # identical
    elif acad9_as_region[i] in 'RHKDESTNQ' and vlcad_as_region[i] in 'RHKDESTNQ':
        conservation.append(1)  # similar (charged/polar)
    elif acad9_as_region[i] in 'AILMFWV' and vlcad_as_region[i] in 'AILMFWV':
        conservation.append(1)  # similar (hydrophobic)
    else:
        conservation.append(0)  # different

positions = range(407, 407 + len(conservation))
colors_bar = ['#4CAF50' if c == 2 else '#FFC107' if c == 1 else '#F44336' for c in conservation]
ax2.bar(positions, conservation, color=colors_bar, width=0.8)
ax2.axvline(x=426, color='black', linestyle='-', linewidth=2, alpha=0.7)
ax2.annotate('E426\n(catalytic)', xy=(426, 2.1), fontsize=8, ha='center', fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xlabel('ACAD9 Residue Position', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_ylabel('Conservation', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_yticks([0, 1, 2])
ax2.set_yticklabels(['Different', 'Similar', 'Identical'], fontsize=8)
ax2.set_title('B. Active Site Conservation\n(ACAD9 vs VLCAD)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Panel C: C-terminal region comparison
ax3 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])

# Compare last 80 residues of each
acad9_cterm_plddt = acad9_plddt[-80:]
vlcad_cterm_plddt = vlcad_plddt[-80:]

acad9_cterm_pos = np.arange(-80, 0)
vlcad_cterm_pos = np.arange(-80, 0)

ax3.fill_between(acad9_cterm_pos, acad9_cterm_plddt, alpha=0.3, color='#2196F3')
ax3.fill_between(vlcad_cterm_pos, vlcad_cterm_plddt, alpha=0.3, color='#F44336')
ax3.plot(acad9_cterm_pos, acad9_cterm_plddt, color='#2196F3', linewidth=2, 
         label=f'ACAD9 (ends at {acad9_resids[-1]})')
ax3.plot(vlcad_cterm_pos, vlcad_cterm_plddt, color='#F44336', linewidth=2,
         label=f'VLCAD (ends at {vlcad_resids[-1]})')

# Mark where ACAD9 would end if aligned to VLCAD
ax3.axvline(x=-34, color='orange', linestyle='--', linewidth=2, alpha=0.7,
            label='ACAD9 terminus\n(VLCAD extends 34 more)')
ax3.set_xlabel('Position from C-terminus', fontsize=10)
ax3.set_ylabel('pLDDT', fontsize=10)
ax3.set_title('C. C-terminal Region\n(Substrate Channel Extension)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax3.legend(fontsize=8, loc='lower left')
ax3.set_ylim(60, 102)

# Panel D: Summary table
ax4 = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, :])
ax4.axis('off')

table_data = [
    ['Feature', 'ACAD9 (Q9H845)', 'VLCAD/ACADVL (P49748)', 'Significance'],
    ['Protein length', '621 aa', '655 aa (+34)', 'VLCAD has C-terminal extension'],
    ['EC number', '1.3.8.8 (long-chain)', '1.3.8.8 + 1.3.8.9\n(long + very-long)', 'ACAD9 lacks VLC EC number'],
    ['Mean pLDDT', '91.9', '90.3', 'Both well-modeled'],
    ['C-term 34 aa pLDDT', '90.8 (last 34 of\n588-621)', '97.8 (622-655)', 'VLCAD extension is\nhighly structured'],
    ['Active site', 'E426', 'E462', 'Conserved catalytic Glu'],
    ['Peak substrates', 'C16:1, C18:1\n(long-chain unsat.)', 'C16:0, C18:0\n(long-chain sat.)', 'Different preferences'],
    ['Longest substrate', 'C22:6 (DHA)\n= 22 carbons', 'C24:0 (lignoceric)\n= 24 carbons', 'Only VLCAD reaches >C22'],
    ['GO:0017099\nsupported?', 'NO', 'YES', 'ACAD9 should use\nGO:0004466 only'],
]

table = ax4.table(cellText=table_data, cellLoc='center', loc='center')
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(9)
table.scale(1, 1.8)

# Style header
for j in range(4):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#BBDEFB')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold')

# Highlight the key row
for j in range(4):
    table[8, j].set_facecolor('#FFECB3')
    table[8, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold')

ax4.set_title('D. Structural and Functional Comparison Summary', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', pad=15)

plt.suptitle('ACAD9 vs VLCAD: Structural Evidence Against GO:0017099 for ACAD9',
             fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)
plt.savefig('acad9_vlcad_structural_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Saved: acad9_vlcad_structural_comparison.png")
